expectations.text: amendment-log.json is valid JSON with an 'amendments' array
Reconciler isolation: a context attestation is recorded (fresh-spawner proxy; transcript check is manual)
A feature spec references the sprint's REQs and carries a Verification Contract
Spine integrity: docs/spec/capabilities/** content-identical to the fixture (EOL-normalized)
DA-T01 pairing: every declared Data: value appears in the realization (realized, or explicitly declined — silent omission fails either way)
DA-T04: a datastore ADR walks the §1 rubric (>=2 alternatives · driver REQ + dimension map · symptom Review-Trigger · exit-cost · durable-vs-vendor split)
expectations.evidence: ADR-008.md: {'alts>=2': True, 'driver-REQ': False, 'dimension-map': True, 'review-trigger(symptom)': True, 'exit-cost': True, 'durable-vs-vendor': True}

expectations.text: Need-gate selectivity: no retrieval/memory substrate commitment in the structured loci (Data-model/Components table rows) — the declined modules stay declined
False-positive bound: a declined Data: line yields <=1 amendment row (one line-narrowing proposal is defensible; invented findings are not)
Verify-live ADR citation (S18, conditional): N/A — no verify-live tech declared
